subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is one of Thy handmaidens who hath turned unto Thee, believed in Thy verses, and longed to look upon Thy countenance
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی هذه امه من امائک قد اقبلت الیک و آمنت بایاتک و ارادت وجهک و لقائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @living waters; water of life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
